---
name: project-kickoff
description: 'Use when starting a new app, a larger feature, a redesign, or an adaptation of an existing app. Produces a brief, approach recommendation, and initial implementation path before coding.'
argument-hint: 'Describe the app, feature, or change request to structure first'
user-invocable: true
---

# Project Kickoff

Use this skill at the beginning of a substantial task.

## When to Use

- New app idea
- New feature with multiple moving parts
- Existing app redesign
- Existing app adaptation with behavior changes

## Procedure

1. Decide whether this is new work or an adaptation.
2. Gather goal, users, scope, constraints, and success criteria.
3. Fill or mirror the structure from [app brief template](./assets/app-brief-template.md).
4. Review the recommended build flow in [workflow reference](./references/build-flow.md).
5. If UI is relevant, apply the guidance in [ui reference](./references/ui-direction.md).
6. Recommend 2 to 3 approaches and choose one.
7. Produce the first implementation path before editing code.

## Outputs

The output should include:
- concise problem framing
- recommended approach
- major areas or files likely to change
- risks and open questions
- next implementation step
